webdavy.description: WebDavy is a Chrome browser extension based on the WebDAV protocol that allows you to manage remote file servers without leaving your browser. Whether it's personal cloud storage or enterprise file servers, WebDavy provides a convenient file management experience with support for uploading, downloading, browsing, and organizing files.
webdavy.features.title: Product Features
webdavy.features.subtitle: Discover the core functionality and advantages of this tool
webdavy.feature1.title: One-Click WebDAV Server Connection
webdavy.feature1.desc: Supports mainstream WebDAV services like NextCloud, OwnCloud, etc., with secure connection configuration storage
webdavy.feature2.title: Complete File Management
webdavy.feature2.desc: Browse, upload, download, create and delete folders directly in your browser

webdavy.servers.subtitle: Compatible with mainstream WebDAV services for different use cases
tinypass.description: TinyPass is a random password generator designed specifically for Chrome browsers, running completely locally without requiring internet connection or login. It helps users generate strong passwords to protect account security, saying goodbye to weak passwords like "123456" and making password management simple and secure.
tinypass.features.title: Product Features
tinypass.features.subtitle: Discover the core functionality and advantages of this tool
tinypass.feature1.title: Smart Password Generation
tinypass.feature1.desc: Supports multiple character set combinations with customizable password length and complexity
tinypass.feature2.title: Local Security
tinypass.feature2.desc: Runs completely locally in your browser, no internet connection or uploads, protecting privacy and security
tinypass.feature3.title: History Management
tinypass.feature3.desc: Saves the last 100 password records for easy searching and management
tinypass.feature4.title: One-Click Copy & Paste
tinypass.feature4.desc: Copy generated passwords to clipboard with one click for quick entry into target websites
tinypass.feature5.title: Recycle Bin Protection
tinypass.feature5.desc: 30-day recycle bin protection, easily recover accidentally deleted passwords
tinypass.feature6.title: Clean & Easy Interface
tinypass.feature6.desc: Intuitive user interface, simple operation, even beginners can get started quickly
tinypass.screenshots.title: Product Screenshots
tinypass.screenshots.subtitle: Get a visual overview of TinyPass's interface and functionality
tinypic.name: Tiny Pic
tinypic.desc: A purely local smart image compression tool supporting multiple formats and privacy protection.
tinypic.description: Tiny Pic is an open-source batch image compression tool running purely locally, supporting JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, SVG, and GIF formats. Completely privacy-protecting with no server uploads. Utilizing the powerful computing capability of your browser to provide an efficient and secure image compression experience.
tinypic.features.title: Product Features
tinypic.features.subtitle: Discover the core functionality and advantages of this tool
tinypic.feature1.title: Purely Local Execution
tinypic.feature1.desc: All compression processes are done locally in the browser, no server upload required, ensuring privacy
tinypic.feature2.title: Multi-Format Support
tinypic.feature2.desc: Supports mainstream image formats including JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, SVG, and GIF
tinypic.feature3.title: Efficient Batch Processing
tinypic.feature3.desc: Supports batch drag-and-drop upload and compression, quickly processing large numbers of images to boost efficiency
tinypic.screenshots.title: Product Screenshots
tinypic.screenshots.subtitle: Get a visual overview of Tiny Pic's interface and functionality

title.lexa: Lexa - Vertical Vocabulary Cards | AI-Driven Bilingual Learning & Export - HolaTiger
lexa.description: Lexa is an online vocabulary card generator for language learners. Enter a word or sentence to quickly generate vertical cards showing definitions, examples, phonetics, and extended vocabulary.

lexa.features.subtitle: Core features of Lexa

lexa.feature1.desc: Generate cards in seconds by simply typing.
lexa.feature2.title: Vertical Design
lexa.feature2.desc: Perfect for mobile viewing and social sharing.
lexa.feature3.title: Comprehensive Info
lexa.feature3.desc: Definitions, examples, phonetics, and more in one card.
lexa.feature4.title: Bilingual Support
lexa.feature4.desc: Supports Chinese and Spanish learning paths.
lexa.feature5.title: Export & Save
lexa.feature5.desc: Supports single and batch export for easy material collection.

title.ezpixy: ezpixy - AI Ecommerce Image Studio | Model Photos, Virtual Try-On, Product Images - HolaTiger
ezpixy.name: ezpixy
ezpixy.desc: AI ecommerce image studio for model photos, virtual try-on, white background images, and product scenes.
ezpixy.hero.title: Turn product photos into launch-ready model images and ecommerce assets in minutes
ezpixy.description: ezpixy is an AI image workspace for ecommerce teams. It supports fashion model generation, virtual try-on, product scene creation, white background images, and detail-level edits so your existing product photos become ready-to-publish assets faster.
ezpixy.features.title: Core capabilities
ezpixy.features.subtitle: This is more than one-off retouching. It packages several high-frequency ecommerce image workflows into one workspace.
ezpixy.feature1.title: AI fashion model generation
ezpixy.feature1.desc: Turn flat lays, hanging shots, or product photos into realistic on-model visuals with less dependence on studio shoots.
ezpixy.feature2.title: Virtual try-on
ezpixy.feature2.desc: Combine model references with garment photos to create try-on results for launches, styling tests, and campaigns.
ezpixy.feature3.title: Product and scene imagery
ezpixy.feature3.desc: Generate ecommerce PDP visuals, campaign graphics, and scene-based product images with a more consistent visual system.
ezpixy.feature4.title: White background output
ezpixy.feature4.desc: Create marketplace-friendly white background images for Amazon, Shopify, and catalog workflows without manual cutouts.
ezpixy.feature5.title: Template replace and close-up details
ezpixy.feature5.desc: Support template replacement, material close-ups, and localized detail edits to fill out product detail pages.
ezpixy.feature6.title: Built for batch operations
ezpixy.feature6.desc: Designed around ecommerce production flows, making it useful for catalog refreshes, asset gaps, and fast multi-SKU processing.
ezpixy.steps.title: Three steps from upload to output
ezpixy.steps.subtitle: The path from source image to usable result is short, which makes it fit rapid testing and high-frequency production.
ezpixy.step1.title: Upload product and reference images
ezpixy.step1.desc: Add product photos, model references, or scene inputs and organize them by workflow.
ezpixy.step2.title: Choose workflow and settings
ezpixy.step2.desc: Pick model generation, try-on, white background, or scene creation, then adjust style and references.
ezpixy.step3.title: Download and reuse outputs
ezpixy.step3.desc: Use the generated images for PDPs, media buying, store operations, or follow-up edits.
ezpixy.gallery.title: Sample results
ezpixy.gallery.subtitle: These examples come from existing poco-ai site assets and show the before-to-after transformation clearly.
ezpixy.gallery.item1.label: AI result
ezpixy.gallery.item1.title: AI fashion model result
ezpixy.gallery.item1.desc: Combine product input with a model reference to create launch-ready apparel visuals that better match a brand style.
ezpixy.gallery.item2.label: AI result
ezpixy.gallery.item2.title: White background product photo
ezpixy.gallery.item2.desc: Useful for marketplace listings and cleaner catalog presentation with less manual cleanup work.
ezpixy.gallery.item3.label: AI result
ezpixy.gallery.item3.title: Virtual try-on output
ezpixy.gallery.item3.desc: Useful for validating styling directions and filling content gaps without extra shoots.
ezpixy.usecases.title: Who it fits
ezpixy.usecases.subtitle: If you work on fashion ecommerce, PDP production, or ad creative, this workflow is closer to real business timing than traditional retouching chains.
ezpixy.usecase1: Fashion brands and DTC sellers that want model shots and product images at lower cost.
ezpixy.usecase2: Marketplace and catalog operators that need white background, scene, and detail-page assets in batches.
ezpixy.usecase3: Social and paid media teams that want to test different styles, audiences, and visual directions quickly.
ezpixy.usecase4: Small teams or agencies that need to validate product presentation ideas fast.
ezpixy.faq.title: FAQ
ezpixy.faq.subtitle: These are the most relevant questions distilled from PRODUCT_MANUAL.md and the current site capabilities.
ezpixy.faq1.a: Flat lays, hanging shots, model references, and clean product photos all work. Clearer inputs with a well-defined subject usually produce more stable results.
ezpixy.faq2.q: What workflows are supported right now?
ezpixy.faq2.a: The current manual covers eight workflow types, including virtual try-on, pose synthesis, scene generation, white background, face swap, custom mode, template replace, and multi-angle generation.
ezpixy.faq3.q: What is the pricing state today?
ezpixy.faq3.a: The codebase already includes a wallet-based credit system with a default task cost of 5 credits, while still leaving room for free trial usage and future plan expansion.
ezpixy.faq4.a: It fits apparel ecommerce, catalog launches, paid acquisition assets, and PDP image gaps best. The main value is reducing the waiting time caused by studio shoots and manual retouching.

about.title: About Me
about.desc: I'm angiie. My daughter was born in the Year of the Tiger; our family loves tiger motifs, and even our dog is called "Tiger" (he's the fifth one, so the name stuck). "Hola" comes from my ongoing Spanish learning — it's the friendly Spanish greeting I like. This site will keep updating Chrome extensions and web tools. Feel free to bookmark and send feedback.

title.handytulip: HandyTulip Gesture Garden - Camera Interaction & CSS Animation Lab | HolaTiger
handytulip.description: A playful web tool: enable your camera and plant tulips with hand gestures. Pure CSS animation, lightweight, no installation required.
handytulip.tips.title: Quick Tips
handytulip.tips.camera: Please allow camera access to enable gesture recognition.
handytulip.tips.play: Basics: show your open palm to preview position, pinch to plant a tulip. Move to adjust placement; near the ground area works best.
handytulip.tips.handopen: Put your hand in front of the camera: hold still and spread your five fingers to plant a tulip at that position 🌷
